summary: Tested Instagram Story Editor module. All 23 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Visual WYSIWYG editor with phone mockup preview, 6 sticker types, multi-account support, and all buttons working correctly.

issues: Sticker buttons missing data-testid attributes for automated testing

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to sticker buttons in StoryEditor.jsx for better test automation
critical_code_review_comments: Route is /admin/instagram-stories (not /instagram-stories) - ensure documentation reflects this
Playwright automation for Instagram login works but may timeout with invalid credentials (expected behavior)
seed_data_creation: Test accounts created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Instagram Story Editor fully functional. Route: /admin/instagram-stories. Visual editor uses @dnd-kit for drag-and-drop stickers. Playwright browser automation installed at /pw-browsers.

Features: 6 sticker types (Poll, Question, Quiz, Mention, Link, Text)

Playwright Automation.Note: Chromium installed at /pw-browsers. Test login endpoint returns 200 (not 500) even with invalid credentials.

ui_verification.Instagram Stories Page: PASS - Shows accounts list, add/delete/test buttons, history links
ui_verification.Add Account Modal: PASS - Opens with username/password fields, save button works
ui_verification.Visual Story Editor: PASS - Phone preview, all 6 sticker types, tabs, account selector, save/publish buttons
ui_verification.Sticker Drag-and-Drop: PASS - Poll sticker added and displayed in phone preview

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. Instagram automation uses Playwright browser automation (against Instagram ToS - warned in UI).
